semantic_description: The function scans a null-terminated character array represented by a prefix list l followed by 0, keeps an index i and accumulator count, increments count exactly for prefix characters not equal to c, stops when it reaches the terminating 0, returns the number of non-c characters in l, and preserves the input string memory unchanged. The loop is a while(1) scan with an internal break on s[i] == 0; the empty string case exits immediately and returns 0.
